name: HYPERNOVA 7D HIFU Device
shortDescription: The HYPERNOVA is a professional 7D HIFU device that combines focused ultrasound, phased radio frequency (RF), and high-frequency EMS in a single system. Non-invasive facelift, body sculpting, and skin rejuvenation – without surgery.
description:
The HYPERNOVA is a professional body treatment and skin rejuvenation device that delivers effective, painless, and impressive results by combining three cutting-edge technologies.

Focused ultrasound provides targeted fat reduction and deep-layer firming, phased radio frequency (RF) stimulates collagen production, and EMS performs intensive muscle stimulation.

A perfect choice for salons and aesthetic centers that want to offer premium-level body sculpting and skin rejuvenation.
metaTitle: HYPERNOVA 7D HIFU Device | Ultrasound + RF + EMS | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: HYPERNOVA 7D HIFU: focused ultrasound, radio frequency, and EMS combined. Non-invasive facelift, fat reduction, body sculpting. CE certified, 12-month warranty.

videoDescription.headline: HYPERNOVA – the new generation of non-invasive body sculpting and skin rejuvenation
paragraphs: 7D HIFU technology is one of the most effective non-invasive methods for facelifting, body sculpting, and skin rejuvenation. Focused ultrasound waves deliver energy into deeper layers of the skin, where the body responds with natural regeneration.
The HYPERNOVA supplements this technology with phased radio frequency and high-frequency EMS, so you can perform complex facial and body treatments with a single device.
Clients are increasingly seeking non-surgical solutions – with the HYPERNOVA, you can be the one to offer these treatments at the highest level.

featureRows.headline: Why is the HYPERNOVA the professional choice?
featureRows.subtitle: Focused ultrasound, radio frequency, and EMS – three technologies, one device

features.title: 7D HIFU – focused ultrasound for deep-layer firming
features.description:
7D HIFU technology uses high-intensity, focused ultrasound waves that deliver energy into the deeper layers of the skin – into the dermis and the SMAS layer. This heat effect triggers natural regeneration.

Effects:

Enhanced collagen and elastin production
Firmer, more elastic skin
Visible facelift effect on the SMAS layer
Targeted fat reduction on various body areas
Lasting, natural results

features.title: Phased radio frequency (RF) – collagen stimulation and wrinkle reduction
features.description:
Phased RF technology creates controlled heat in the deeper layers of the skin, stimulating collagen production and improving skin structure.
Collagen fiber contraction and regeneration
Fine and deep wrinkle reduction
Skin tone and elasticity improvement
Face, neck, and decolletage treatment
non-invasivepainlessnatural results

features.title: High-frequency EMS – muscle stimulation and contouring
features.description:
EMS (electrical muscle stimulation) technology triggers targeted muscle contractions, resulting in firmer contours and better body shape through active muscle work.
Targeted muscle stimulation
Tone enhancement and firming
Contour improvement (abdomen, thighs, arms)
Comfortable, painless experience

features.title: Treatment areas – from face to body
features.description:
The HYPERNOVA is a versatile device applicable to numerous face and body areas.
Face and neck – contouring, lifting
Abdomen and waist – targeted body sculpting
Thighs and buttocks – cellulite reduction
Arms and shoulders – tone enhancement

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: We provide professional operator training for the HYPERNOVA 7D HIFU device within the framework of officially registered adult education. The training comprehensively covers the operation, treatment protocols, and safety requirements of HIFU, RF, and EMS technologies.
items: Operating principles and mechanism of 7D HIFU technology
Application areas of phased radio frequency (RF)
Facial and body treatment protocols for various areas
Correct application and settings of treatment units
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official, FAR-system generated certificate with B-number.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Varga Katalin
testimonials.text: The HYPERNOVA completely transformed my salon's service palette. <mark>The combination of facial and body treatments is unique</mark> – clients love that they can get both a facelift and body sculpting with a single device. The 7D HIFU effect is impressive!

testimonials.name: Nagy Renáta
testimonials.text: I specifically chose the HYPERNOVA for body sculpting and cellulite reduction treatments. <mark>My clients experience visible changes after just 3-4 treatments</mark>, and the EMS technology has also become very popular with us.

testimonials.name: Papp Zsófia
testimonials.text: The demand for HIFU facelift treatments is <mark>enormous</mark>, and with the HYPERNOVA I can serve my clients at a professional level. The combination of three technologies truly delivers more than they would individually. The training was also thorough and professional.

expertQuote.quote: 7D HIFU technology is one of the most effective non-invasive methods for facelifting and body sculpting. The HYPERNOVA, combining focused ultrasound with RF and EMS, offers a comprehensive treatment capability that was previously only achievable with multiple devices.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What is 7D HIFU and how does it work?
faq.answer: 7D HIFU (High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound) uses high-intensity, focused ultrasound waves that deliver energy into the deeper layers of the skin. This heat effect creates micro-injuries, to which the body responds with natural regeneration – collagen and elastin production increases, and the skin becomes firmer and more elastic.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: During HIFU treatment, mild warmth and tingling are experienced, but the treatment is generally well-tolerated and doesn't require anesthesia. RF and EMS treatments are also painless.

faq.question: When are results visible?
faq.answer: Some improvement may be noticeable after the first treatment, but due to increased collagen production, the full result develops over 2–3 months. The HIFU effect typically lasts 6–12 months, while RF and EMS treatments strengthen results through a course format.

faq.question: What areas can it be used on?
faq.answer: Face, neck, double chin, abdomen, waist, thighs, buttocks, arms, and shoulders. HIFU for facelifting and body sculpting, RF for skin firming and wrinkle reduction, EMS for muscle stimulation and contouring.

faq.question: Is there recovery time after treatment?
faq.answer: There's no significant recovery time after treatment. Mild redness may occur, which typically subsides within a few hours. The client can immediately continue their daily activities after treatment.

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: A one-day official adult education operator training course, free with device purchase. The training covers HIFU, RF, and EMS technology operation, treatment protocols, and safety requirements. We issue a FAR-system generated certificate with B-number.

faq.question: How quickly does the HYPERNOVA pay for itself?
faq.answer: HIFU treatment prices typically range from 25,000–60,000 Ft, body treatment prices are in a similar range. With 8–12 treatments per week, the device generally pays for itself within 3–5 months. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

whatsIncluded: HIFU treatment heads (for face and body)
